'''K Company''' was a [[Company/Legends|company]] of<ref name="GGAR" /> 144 [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], with added support personnel,<ref name="Composition" /> that served within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] [[Hawkbat Battalion]], a [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] in the [[327th Star Corps/Legends|327th Star Corps]], during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Originally led by [[Clone Captain/Legends|Clone Captain]] [[Deviss/Legends|Deviss]], K Company was<ref name="GGAR" /> subdivided into four [[Platoon/Legends|platoons]]<ref name="Composition" /> and participated in the war's [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|first battle]] on<ref name="GGAR" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]<ref name="Geonosis">[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War'': Prima Official Game Guide]]</ref> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref>

During the battle, Hawkbat Battalion and K Company were ordered to march toward a column of Separatist [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|spider droids]], leading to both units [[Death/Legends|losing]] most of their forces. Deviss and two critically injured [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] survived, holding out for three [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] in a shallow crater, as Deviss tended to the wounded and defended his position against the advancing column. Eventually rescued by casevac, Deviss was awarded a medal for his actions and was given a new command after the battle's end.<ref name="GGAR" />

==Behind the scenes==
K Company was first mentioned in "[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]," a [[2005]] reference article written by [[Karen Traviss]] and [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]] for the [[Star Wars Insider 84|eighty-fourth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine.<ref name="GGAR" /> The company was later pictured as part of a [[2013]] action figure set for [[Hasbro]]'s ''[[Star Wars: Saga Legends]]'' line of toys.<ref name="Saga Legends">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: Saga Legends|pack=Battle of Geonosis (Jedi Knights)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/Hasbro-Star-Wars/saga-legends-2013/multipacks/tru-exclusive-battle-of-geonosis-jedi-knights-deviss/photo-archive.asp}}</ref>
